explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.path_to_improvement: Document AI governance structure, including oversight of vendor AI tools.

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: A company-owned blog post details specific AI capabilities, such as OCR and NLP, and explains their application in claims processing. This post also mentions the integration of these AI tools.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

relevant_sources.summary: This company-owned blog post, "NextGen Lab Emerging Technologies," provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. The blog post demonstrates transparency by detailing specific AI capabilities like OCR and NLP and explaining their application in claims processing, as well as mentioning the integration of these AI tools.
relevant_sources.title: NextGen Lab Emerging Technologies

summary.overall_findings: Securian Financial's public documentation was reviewed across 7 responsible AI pillars, and no qualifying evidence was identified. While the assessment reviewed 6 publicly available sources, no documented AI governance, oversight, or accountability practices were found.
